pages.full_text:
INFORMAL CONCERT

Sunday 17th October 2004 : 7.30 p.m. St Edmund's Hall

Bacchanale
    Jonathan Hill (timpani)

Ian Wright

Moderato
    Michael Allum (piano)

Haydn

Black and White Blues
    Catherine Ponting (cello)

Paul Harris

Curtain Call Blues
    'The Five'
    John Foxall (trumpet), Matthew McDade (trombone)
    Jonathan Hill (vibraphone), Gregory Swinford (piano)

Peter Churchill

Tell me Lovely Shepherd (from Solomon)
    Scott Mahoney (treble)

Boyce (arr. E.Poston)

Andante
    Andrew McDade (tuba)

Capuzzi
pages.notes: This page is a printed concert programme on orange/red paper, glued into the diary. No handwritten text is visible on this page. The programme is for an Informal Concert at St Edmund's Hall on Sunday 17th October 2004.

pages.notes: This page is the continuation of the same printed concert programme on orange/red paper. No handwritten text visible. The overlap with the left page ('Andante' / 'Capuzzi') is the natural continuation of the programme; 'Andante' on this page appears to refer to the same item shown at the bottom of the left page — the right page continues the programme listing from that point.
